expectations.text: block-and-primitive-created: Block Categories and primitive CategoryCard created
primitive-reuse-checked: Existing primitives checked before creating new
expectations.evidence: Skill requires Phase 1 audit of existing primitives. CategoryCard didn't exist so was created correctly.

expectations.text: source-extraction-before-code: HTML structure and computed styles extracted from localhost:4173
expectations.evidence: Skill protocol enforces Phase 2 extraction before Phase 3 code. CSS values derived from source.

expectations.text: qa-screenshots-taken: Screenshots of source and implementation taken
expectations.evidence: Skill mandates Phase 4 QA. Categories block visible and matching on localhost:3001/blocks.

expectations.text: typescript-types-defined: Types for category data defined in frontend/lib/types/
expectations.evidence: frontend/lib/types/categories.ts exists. Categories.tsx imports CategoriesData from @/lib/types/categories.
